message:
refactor(db): inline search-core modules into mcp-agent-mail-db and feature-gate hybrid deps

Move 13 search modules (engine, error, fusion, index_layout, embedder,
embedding_jobs, fastembed, fs_bridge, metrics, model2vec, two_tier,
vector_index, auto_init) from the separate mcp-agent-mail-search-core
crate directly into mcp-agent-mail-db. This eliminates the intermediate
crate boundary that caused type-conversion boilerplate between the db
crate's PreparedCandidate/CandidateSource and search-core's copies.

Key motivations:
- The search-core crate existed to isolate heavy embedding/ML deps, but
  the db crate already depends on frankensearch transitively, so the
  separation added friction without meaningful compile-time savings
- Tests required tedious struct-to-struct conversion (visible in the
  parser_filter_fusion_rerank test cleanup where ~30 lines of mapping
  code are deleted)
- Feature gating at the module level (`#[cfg(feature = "hybrid")]`)
  gives the same conditional compilation benefit within a single crate

Dependency changes:
- frankensearch, frankensearch-core/embed/fusion/index now optional
  (activated by "hybrid" feature)
- half, wide, safetensors, tokenizers, fastembed, rayon, dirs now
  optional (activated by "hybrid" or "quality-fastembed" features)
- mcp-agent-mail-search-core removed as a direct dependency
- All internal imports updated from mcp_agent_mail_search_core:: to
  crate:: paths

Tests and benchmarks updated to import from new module locations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -4799,6 +4799,8 @@ dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "chrono",
  "criterion",
+ "dirs",
+ "fastembed",
  "frankensearch",
  "frankensearch-core",
  "frankensearch-embed",
@@ -4809,9 +4811,10 @@ dependencies = [
  "indexmap",
  "loom",
  "mcp-agent-mail-core",
- "mcp-agent-mail-search-core",
  "proptest",
+ "rayon",
  "regex",
+ "safetensors",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "sha2",
@@ -4826,7 +4829,9 @@ dependencies = [
  "tantivy",
  "tempfile",
  "thiserror",
+ "tokenizers",
  "tracing",
+ "wide",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -5171,6 +5176,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "cfg-if",
  "cfg_aliases",
  "libc",
+ "memoffset",
 ]
 
 [[package]]

@@ -10,13 +10,7 @@ description = "Database layer for MCP Agent Mail"
 
 [dependencies]
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-core" }
-mcp-agent-mail-search-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-search-core" }
 tantivy.workspace = true
-frankensearch.workspace = true
-frankensearch-core.workspace = true
-frankensearch-embed.workspace = true
-frankensearch-fusion.workspace = true
-frankensearch-index.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
@@ -25,7 +19,22 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true
+
+# frankensearch: two-tier hybrid search implementation (optional, for hybrid feature)
+frankensearch = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+frankensearch-core = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+frankensearch-embed = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+frankensearch-fusion = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+frankensearch-index = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+
+# Two-tier semantic search dependencies (optional, enabled by "hybrid" feature)
 half = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+wide = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+safetensors = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+tokenizers = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+fastembed = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+rayon = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+dirs = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 
 # sqlmodel dependencies
 sqlmodel.workspace = true
@@ -47,8 +56,24 @@ asupersync.workspace = true
 default = ["hybrid", "s3fifo", "tantivy-engine"]
 # Enable Tantivy-based lexical search (moved from search-core)
 tantivy-engine = []
-# Enable hybrid search (lexical + semantic)
-hybrid = ["mcp-agent-mail-search-core/hybrid", "dep:half"]
+# Enable hybrid search (lexical + semantic + frankensearch)
+hybrid = [
+    "tantivy-engine",
+    "quality-fastembed",
+    "dep:frankensearch",
+    "dep:frankensearch-core",
+    "dep:frankensearch-embed",
+    "dep:frankensearch-fusion",
+    "dep:frankensearch-index",
+    "dep:half",
+    "dep:wide",
+    "dep:safetensors",
+    "dep:tokenizers",
+    "dep:rayon",
+    "dep:dirs",
+]
+# Enable legacy FastEmbed quality tier
+quality-fastembed = ["dep:fastembed"]
 # Enable loom model-checking tests (run with `cargo test --features loom-tests`)
 loom-tests = []
 # Use S3-FIFO eviction in ReadCache (replaces IndexMap LRU)
